---
title: "NodeLayer.tsx"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\pennyone\vis\components\NodeLayer.tsx"
loc: 80
complexity: 6
logic_score: 5.35
style_score: 3.98
intel_score: 2.00
overall_score: 3.68
---

## Intent
The `NodeLayer.tsx` module optimizes the rendering of thousands of files using instanced meshes. It categorizes nodes into distinct 'Tiers' based on their Gungnir scores and applies performance-aware materials and visual effects to ensure a smooth framerate in high-density graphs.

## Interaction Protocol
This component is rendered within the `NeuralGraph`. It receives the full array of node data and uses `THREE.InstancedMesh` to efficiently render the visual representation of every sector in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 2.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 14 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [useRef](file://react)
- [useMemo](file://react)
- [*](file://three)
- [useFrame](file://@react-three/fiber)
- [Node](file://../types/index.ts)
- [Link](file://../types/index.ts)
- [useNodeEffects](file://../logic/useNodeEffects.ts)

### Exports
- `tempObject`
- `tempColor`
- `NodeTier`
- `meshRef`
- `useNodeEffects`
- `currentMesh`
- `calculateEffect`
- `NodeLayer`
- `NodeLayer`
- `useNodeEffects`
- `nodesByDetail`
- `tiers`
- `calculateEffect`
- `tierIdx`
